courses.title: Git Mastery
courses.description: Master distributed version control from commits and branches to rebasing, worktrees, and the internals of the object store.

courses.title: Terminal Fundamentals
courses.description: From basic navigation to shell scripting, process management, and piping.

courses.title: HTTP Fundamentals
courses.description: Understand the protocol that powers the web. Requests, responses, headers, caching, TLS, and HTTP/2.

courses.title: Rust Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn systems programming with Rust. Ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, traits, async/await.

courses.title: TypeScript Mastery
courses.description: Go beyond basic types. Generics, conditional types, mapped types, declaration merging.

courses.title: Python Mastery
courses.description: Deep Python — decorators, metaclasses, async/await, type annotations, packaging.

courses.title: Docker Fundamentals
courses.description: Containers from scratch. Images, layers, networking, volumes, Compose, and production hardening.

courses.title: Linux Administration
courses.description: Systemd, users, permissions, networking, package management, cron jobs, and production server hardening.

courses.title: CI/CD Fundamentals
courses.description: Build automated pipelines with GitHub Actions. Testing, linting, deployment, secrets management.

courses.title: CSS Mastery
courses.description: Modern CSS — Grid, Flexbox, custom properties, animations, container queries.

courses.title: Security Fundamentals
courses.description: Web security from first principles. OWASP Top 10, authentication, authorization, cryptography.

courses.title: System Design
courses.description: Design scalable distributed systems. Load balancing, databases, caching, queues, and real-world case studies.

courses.title: SQL Fundamentals
courses.description: Relational databases from SELECT to window functions, CTEs, indexes, query plans, and transactions.

courses.title: Testing Fundamentals
courses.description: Unit tests, integration tests, e2e tests. TDD, property-based testing, mocking, coverage.

courses.title: LLM Fundamentals
courses.description: Build applications with large language models. Prompting, RAG, tool use, evals, and production deployment.

courses.title: Open Source Contribution
courses.description: Navigate real codebases, write good issues, submit PRs, understand governance.
